title: Enemy Targeting
summary: Give the enemy a clear detection range and chase behavior.
playerOutcome: When the player moves close enough, the enemy visibly turns and chases them; outside that range it remains idle.

acceptanceCriteria.text: The enemy remains idle while the player is outside the detection range.
The enemy chases the player while the player is inside the detection range.
The Godot project passes the pinned headless verification command.

verification.instruction: Move the player into and out of the enemy's detection range and observe idle and chase behavior.
